identity: Wiry human male scavenger, unshaven stubble, messy sandy-brown hair under leather goggles pushed up on the forehead, quick hazel eyes, sun-weathered tanned skin.
outfit: Patchwork tunic of mismatched leather and cloth scraps, a bandolier of pouches across the chest, dusty brown cloak, fingerless gloves, worn brown trousers, scuffed boots. A lantern clipped to the belt.
weapons: A rugged wooden crossbow held in both hands, quiver of short bolts at the hip.
attackStyle: East-facing. Crossbow aimed and fired forward, bolt mid-flight from the tip. Right foot braced, cloak flaring.
spellStyle: East-facing. Crossbow held in one hand at his side, other hand holding up a small crystal vial glowing amber.
blockStyle: East-facing. Crossbow held horizontally across the body, crouched low, cloak pulled up as partial cover.
koStyle: East-facing, fallen on his side, crossbow dropped beside him, goggles fallen over the eyes, bandolier splayed.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), relaxed cocky idle. Crossbow resting on shoulder, free hand on hip. Goggles on forehead.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Stubble, goggles on forehead, bandolier of pouches across the chest.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Wiry human male scavenger, unshaven stubble, messy sandy-brown hair under leather goggles pushed up on the forehead, quick hazel eyes, sun-weathered tanned skin.

OUTFIT: Patchwork tunic of mismatched leather and cloth scraps, a bandolier of pouches across the chest, dusty brown cloak, fingerless gloves, worn brown trousers, scuffed boots. A lantern clipped to the belt.

WEAPONS: A rugged wooden crossbow held in both hands, quiver of short bolts at the hip.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Wiry human male scavenger, unshaven stubble, messy sandy-brown hair under leather goggles pushed up on the forehead, quick hazel eyes, sun-weathered tanned skin.

OUTFIT: Patchwork tunic of mismatched leather and cloth scraps, a bandolier of pouches across the chest, dusty brown cloak, fingerless gloves, worn brown trousers, scuffed boots. A lantern clipped to the belt.

WEAPONS: A rugged wooden crossbow held in both hands, quiver of short bolts at the hip.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Stubble, goggles on forehead, bandolier of pouches across the chest.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
